'''鈭歝h-s-w''' ('''kachasaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hikoi|hikoi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hikoi|hikoi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kachasaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichasaw|thichasaw]] || [[word:jichasaw|jichasaw]] || [[word:shichasaw|shichasaw]] || [[word:kichasaw|kichasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchasaw|thuthuchasaw]] || [[word:jujuchasaw|jujuchasaw]] || [[word:shushuchasaw|shushuchasaw]] || [[word:kukuchasaw|kukuchasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchasaw|thuchasaw]] || [[word:juchasaw|juchasaw]] || [[word:shuchasaw|shuchasaw]] || [[word:kuchasaw|kuchasaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchasaw|thuchasaw]] || [[word:juchasaw|juchasaw]] || [[word:shuchasaw|shuchasaw]] || [[word:kuchasaw|kuchasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechasaw|thechasaw]] || [[word:jechasaw|jechasaw]] || [[word:shechasaw|shechasaw]] || [[word:kechasaw|kechasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochasaw|thothochasaw]] || [[word:jojochasaw|jojochasaw]] || [[word:shoshochasaw|shoshochasaw]] || [[word:kokochasaw|kokochasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochasaw|thochasaw]] || [[word:jochasaw|jochasaw]] || [[word:shochasaw|shochasaw]] || [[word:kochasaw|kochasaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochasaw|thochasaw]] || [[word:jochasaw|jochasaw]] || [[word:shochasaw|shochasaw]] || [[word:kochasaw|kochasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]] || [[word:chasaw|chasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chasaw|th忙chasaw]] || [[word:j忙chasaw|j忙chasaw]] || [[word:sh忙chasaw|sh忙chasaw]] || [[word:k忙chasaw|k忙chasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachasaw|thathachasaw]] || [[word:jajachasaw|jajachasaw]] || [[word:shashachasaw|shashachasaw]] || [[word:kakachasaw|kakachasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachasaw|thachasaw]] || [[word:jachasaw|jachasaw]] || [[word:shachasaw|shachasaw]] || [[word:kachasaw|kachasaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachasaw|thachasaw]] || [[word:jachasaw|jachasaw]] || [[word:shachasaw|shachasaw]] || [[word:kachasaw|kachasaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachasaw|shachasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachasaw|goshachasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachasaw|gokishachasaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachasawn眉|shachasawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachasawnkn眉|goshachasawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasawn眉|gokishachasawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachasawsh毛|shachasawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachasawnksh毛|goshachasawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachasawsh毛|gokishachasawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasawro|shachasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasawnkro|goshachasawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasawro|gokishachasawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasawmu|shachasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasawnkmu|goshachasawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasawmu|gokishachasawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachasawsher|shachasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachasawnksher|goshachasawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachasawsher|gokishachasawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachasawng|shachasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachasawnkng|goshachasawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachasawng|gokishachasawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachasawya|shachasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachasawnkya|goshachasawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachasawya|gokishachasawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachasawyam|shachasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachasawnkyam|goshachasawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachasawyam|gokishachasawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasawn眉sh毛|shachasawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasawnkn眉sh毛|goshachasawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasawn眉sh毛|gokishachasawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasawn眉ro|shachasawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasawnkn眉ro|goshachasawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasawn眉ro|gokishachasawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasawn眉mu|shachasawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasawnkn眉mu|goshachasawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasawn眉mu|gokishachasawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasawsh毛n眉|shachasawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasawnksh毛n眉|goshachasawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasawsh毛n眉|gokishachasawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasawsh毛ro|shachasawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasawnksh毛ro|goshachasawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasawsh毛ro|gokishachasawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasawsh毛mu|shachasawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasawnksh毛mu|goshachasawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasawsh毛mu|gokishachasawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasawron眉|shachasawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasawnkron眉|goshachasawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasawron眉|gokishachasawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasawrosh毛|shachasawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasawnkrosh毛|goshachasawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasawrosh毛|gokishachasawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasawromu|shachasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasawnkromu|goshachasawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasawromu|gokishachasawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasawmun眉|shachasawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasawnkmun眉|goshachasawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasawmun眉|gokishachasawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasawmush毛|shachasawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasawnkmush毛|goshachasawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasawmush毛|gokishachasawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasawmuro|shachasawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasawnkmuro|goshachasawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasawmuro|gokishachasawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
